inputs.label: Conversion Factor (g/mg)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from mg to g, may be adjusted for traceability

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from mg to g, may be adjusted for traceability
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mg'den g'ye standart dönüşüm faktörü, izlenebilirlik için ayarlanabilir
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor von mg in g, kann für Rückverfolgbarkeit angepasst werden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard de mg en g, peut être ajusté pour la traçabilité
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar de mg a g, puede ajustarse para trazabilidad
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل القياسي من ملغ إلى غ، يمكن تعديله لأغراض التتبع

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output to meet precision requirements

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output to meet precision requirements
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hassasiyet gereksinimlerini karşılamak için çıktıdaki ondalık basamak sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe, um Genauigkeitsanforderungen zu erfüllen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour la sortie afin de répondre aux exigences de précision
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida, para cumplir con requisitos de precisión
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية للمخرجات لتلبية متطلبات الدقة

inputs.label: Batch Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for batch scaling, e.g., number of units

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for batch scaling, e.g., number of units
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti ölçekleme için çarpan, örn. birim sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Chargenskalierung, z. B. Anzahl der Einheiten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour la mise à l'échelle du lot, par exemple nombre d'unités
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para escalado de lotes, ej. número de unidades
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف لتوسيع النطاق، مثل عدد الوحدات

inputs.label: Rounding Mode (0=round,1=floor,2=ceil)
inputs.businessContext: Rounding mode for compliance with rounding rules

businessContext_i18n.en: Rounding mode for compliance with rounding rules
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mode d'arrondi pour la conformité aux règles d'arrondi
businessContext_i18n.es: Modo de redondeo para cumplir con reglas de redondeo

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
